topic: Jardines y parques de Valencia — cycling through them, showing gardens and parks to people
items: silla (chair — to be selected from clip DB)

variants.rationale: Safe v1 with a proven exploration format. 60 Segundos En is designed for location showcases — perfect for cycling through 3 parks. OBSERVADOR's calm reflective tone matches scenic garden footage. COLD OPEN structure front-loads a striking visual of Turia or Jardín Real to hook immediately. Avoids all recently used personas (POETA, VECINA), structures (LOOP, CLASSIC), and hooks.

Minimal narration variant for mix diversity. 'Lo Que Nadie Ve' thrives on hidden details — lesser-known corners of Valencia's parks that cyclists pass without noticing. REPORTERO delivers factual observations sparingly over ambient garden sounds. PSP structure lets the visuals build a problem (people miss these spaces) before the reveal. Medium duration contrasts with v1's longer format.

Short viral play with VERY HIGH potential. The abandoned chair found in/near a park gets a price reveal — 'Cuanto Cuesta' format is the channel's strongest viral signal. ENERGETICO's fast punchy delivery keeps the sub-30s runtime tight. MICRO structure's 4 sections prevent over-explanation. This is the most shareable variant: quick, surprising, and algorithm-friendly.
